---
name: New Experiment
about: Propose a new xLaDe experiment
title: "[EXPERIMENT] "
---

# Experiment Proposal

## Experiment ID

```
exp-XXX-name
```

## Summary

Describe the experiment.

## Research Question

What problem is being investigated?

## Hypothesis

What is expected?

## Enforcement Mechanism

How will the experiment be enforced?

## Success Criteria

How will success be measured?

## Failure Criteria

How will failure be measured?

## Dependencies

Required tools, repositories, or infrastructure.

## Reproducibility

How can the experiment be reproduced?

## Documentation

- [ ] README.md included
- [ ] METRICS.md included
- [ ] experiment.toml included
- [ ] Lifecycle documented

## Kernel Boundary Verification

- [ ] No modifications to `lean-core/`
- [ ] Experiment operates entirely at ecosystem level
